data.content: Approved: compatibility.rs adds populate_profile_prompts() that renders per-profile prompt variants using each profile's output mode. mod.rs promotes render_prompt_template and build_prompt_params to production code, adds resolve_output_specific_sections for conditional block resolution. profile.rs bridges builtin workflow action_prompts into ProfileRegistry. tests_helpers.rs delegates to production functions. Tests in tests_registry_ext.rs verify autopilot vs autopilot_with_pr produce distinct prompts. Clean, correct implementation.
